# X Y U V - Example unstructured velocity data
0.0 0.0 1.0 0.0
1000.0 0.0 1.5 0.1
2000.0 0.0 2.0 0.2
3000.0 0.0 2.5 0.3
4000.0 0.0 3.0 0.4
0.0 1000.0 1.0 0.1
1000.0 1000.0 1.5 0.2
2000.0 1000.0 2.0 0.3
3000.0 1000.0 2.5 0.4
4000.0 1000.0 3.0 0.5
0.0 5000.0 1.0 0.2
1000.0 5000.0 1.5 0.3
2000.0 5000.0 2.0 0.4
3000.0 5000.0 2.5 0.5
4000.0 5000.0 3.0 0.6
